text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Medicines only matter if they’re safe, effective and accessible to the people who need them. Explore the programs we offer to help people access our medicines.

teaser.description: We offer a wide range of country-specific, disease-state patient programs that provide empowering support to patients who have been prescribed AbbVie medicines.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: AbbVie Patient Access Support

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Patients in the U.S. without insurance or those with limited coverage for our medicines may be eligible to receive AbbVie medicines at no cost to them through myAbbVie Assist.

cta.aria-label: learn more about myabbvie assist Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: In the U.S., we offer programs for patients with commercial insurance to help lower the financial and logistical barriers that block many patients from accessing or continuing their prescribed therapies.

teaser.description: We offer tools to help patients learn more about prescription drug coverage and accessing their treatments.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: Patient Resources

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Patients enrolled in Medicare or looking for a plan can consult this easy-to-follow guide to learn more about Medicare plans and prescription drug coverage.

cta.linkText: click here for medicare in 2025 guide
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Patients can use this guide to learn more about how to navigate prior authorization as part of their prescription drug coverage.

cta_284789085.aria-label: learn more about patient assistance Opens in same window
cta_284789085.linkText: click here for prior authorization guide
cta_284789085.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: We work with multiple global partners to provide AbbVie products needed to support low-income countries, medical missions, war zones and natural disasters. Our partners include organizations such as Direct Relief, Americares, Operation Smile and many more.
